title: I let AI build a tool to help me figure out what was waking me up at night
summary: The author describes how they used AI to build a custom tool to identify the causes of their nighttime awakenings, combining personal experimentation with AI-assisted development to track and analyze sleep disruptions.
highlights: Used AI to iteratively design and refine a personalized sleep disruption analysis tool
Focused on real-world problem-solving rather than theoretical AI use
Demonstrates practical application of AI for self-experimentation and health insights
